name: Black & White Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Great Northern Beans (rinsed and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions in oil until crisp-tender in a medium skillet.
2. Remove from heat and let cool until warm.
3. Stir in vinegar, red pepper, parsley, garlic, NutraSweet (tm), salt, and pepper.
4. In a serving bowl, combine the beans (both types) with the onion mixture.
5. Mix well and serve.
Makes 8 servings
Nutritional Information: Serving size 1/8 recipe
Diabetic food exchange: 1 starch, 1 vegetable, 1/2 fat
